case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. PHILLIP BIEN et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS / ORDER PERMITTING SERVICE BY POSTING AND MAILING PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 415.45 (COPY IN D.206)

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON FEB-16-2011 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT PHILLIP BIEN'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIES THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: MARLA MILLER; CLERK: E. BURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON FEB-16-2011 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT PHILLIP BIEN'S WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIES THE APPLICATION AS TO JURY FEES AND EXPENSES AND COURT REPORTER FEES. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: MARLA MILLER; CLERK: E. BURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
FEES NOT PAID. FILINGS OF PHILLIP BIEN ARE STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT TO PARTIES.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BIEN, PHILLIP THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2553 SUTTER STREET, #229, SAN FRANCISCO, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
